ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contaminant being measured */,
  "sampling_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the sampling started */,
  "sampling_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the sampling ended */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the sample analysis (e.g., 0.00218mg/L) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sample (e.g., water, soil, air) */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sampling method used */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who collected the sample */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was analyzed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report associated with the sample */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample (e.g., collected, analyzed, reported) */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected (for soil and water samples) */,
  "sample_volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample collected */,
  "sample_weight" REAL /* Weight of the sample collected */,
  "sample_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of sampling */,
  "sample_pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the time of sampling (for air samples) */,
  "sample_quality_control" TEXT /* Indicates if quality control measures were applied during sampling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_contaminant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contaminant_id") REFERENCES contaminants ("contaminant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES sampling_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_sample_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_type_id") REFERENCES sample_types ("sample_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sampling_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contaminants" (
  "contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contaminant */,
  "contaminant_name" TEXT /* Name of the contaminant (e.g., lead) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units in which the contaminant is measured (e.g., mg/L) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold level for regulatory compliance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contaminant */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number for the contaminant */,
  "cas_name" TEXT /* CAS name for the contaminant */,
  "physical_state" TEXT /* Physical state of the contaminant (e.g., solid, liquid, gas) */,
  "toxicity_class" TEXT /* Toxicity class of the contaminant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contaminant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., City, State, Country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., urban, rural, industrial) */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Status of the site (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "site_water_source" TEXT /* Primary water source for the site (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "sample_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type (e.g., water, soil, air) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  "sample_type_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the sample type */,
  "sample_type_properties" TEXT /* Specific properties relevant to the sample type (e.g., pH range, temperature sensitivity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling method (e.g., grab sample, composite sample) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sampling method */,
  "method_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the sampling method */,
  "method_procedure" TEXT /* Detailed procedure for the sampling method */,
  "method_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the sampling process */,
  "method_quality_control" TEXT /* Indicates if quality control measures are required for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the technician belongs to */,
  "technician_qualification" TEXT /* Qualifications of the technician */,
  "technician_certification" TEXT /* Certifications the technician holds */,
  "technician_experience" TEXT /* Years of experience of the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations made in the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report (e.g., internal, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "author_qualification" TEXT /* Qualifications of the author */,
  "author_certification" TEXT /* Certifications the author holds */,
  "author_experience" TEXT /* Years of experience of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., technician, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_qualification" TEXT /* Qualifications of the user */,
  "user_certification" TEXT /* Certifications the user holds */,
  "user_experience" TEXT /* Years of experience of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for accessing the sample data */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory standard */,
  "contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contaminant the standard applies to */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory standard */,
  "standard_value" REAL /* Value of the regulatory standard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the standard was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory standard */,
  "standard_authority" TEXT /* Regulatory authority that set the standard */,
  "standard_document" TEXT /* Reference to the document where the standard is published */,
  "standard_remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks about the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_standards_contaminant_id FOREIGN KEY ("contaminant_id") REFERENCES contaminants ("contaminant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample the observation is associated with */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date the observation was recorded */,
  "observation_text" TEXT /* Text of the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who recorded the observation */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., visual, chemical) */,
  "observation_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the observation (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "observation_action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken as a result of the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_observations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)
